reasoning: The NIST 800-171 control 3.1.5 focuses on employing the principle of least privilege, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC configurations. Kubernetes provides mechanisms to enforce least privilege through Roles, ClusterRoles, RoleBindings, and ClusterRoleBindings. Ensuring that no unnecessary cluster-admin bindings exist, enforcing least privilege across all roles, and ensuring service accounts are granted only necessary permissions are key aspects of this control.
title: 3_1_5: 3.1.5 Employ the principle of least privilege, including for specific security functions and privileged accounts
